positive: A whimsical, symmetrical, and highly detailed illustration of a celestial raccoon wearing a crown of crescent moons and stardust, sitting atop a stylized stack of glowing, arcane books. The raccoon has a dramatic, expressive pose, surrounded by floating elements like miniature nebulae, constellations, and enchanted butterflies. The overall style is neo-Victorian fantasy etching combined with modern kawaii surrealism, rendered with thick, contrasting black line work on a slightly aged parchment background. Strong directional rim lighting highlights the fur and the glowing elements. Flat 2D composition suitable for apparel print, high contrast, clean silhouettes, elegant gothic color palette (deep indigo, emerald green, pale gold, charcoal).
negative: low resolution, grainy, blur, artifact, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, cluttered, realistic photo, low contrast, noise
